caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with text on it. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly personal studio space, as evidenced by the numerous framed photographs and memorabilia adorning the walls behind him. To his right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and black pants, suggesting that the location might also serve as a clothing store or a space where fashion items are displayed. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, indicating interaction with someone or something outside the frame. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, typical of a podcast recording environment.
